title: Operation SOP Nears Its Target
description: Pages 16–17 focus on operation sop nears its target, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What on earth are you doing!??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, now this night will truly begin, my soldiers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even the soldiers are RAM- paging now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm not doing this!! My body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...Why's my body moving on its own....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...!!? And the same thing is happening to the king....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, can we head out now, doffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Why are you doing this, King Riku!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: He'd never make such a mistake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: No Expla Nation can make this right, now...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: More, more...!!! I want the whole country trembling with fear!! And then, when they've come to hate King Riku with all their hearts....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: That's when the hero will appear...!

summary: Operation SOP Nears Its Target focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.
